settings.code:
<style>


@media (min-width: 768px) {
#Product--{{ section.id }} .rc-overlay .product__title{
color: #fff !important;}

.product__title {
font-size: 30px;
}

.radio__fieldset{
grid-template-columns: 100%;
}
.product__price {
padding: 0;

}
.rc-offer-subline, .rc-variant-subline{display:none;}
.product__price span {
font-size: 26px !important;
font-weight:1000 !important;
color:#e9f2ff !important;
    font-family: var(--FONT-STACK-HEADING);
    font-style: var(--FONT-STYLE-HEADING);
    font-weight: var(--FONT-WEIGHT-HEADING);
    letter-spacing: var(--LETTER-SPACING-HEADING);
}

.radio__fieldset--swatches .radio__buttons {
gap: 2px !important;
}

.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] .swatch__button--square {
    width: calc((100% - (5 * 10px)) / 6) !important;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    min-width: 44px;
    max-width: 56px;
    border-radius: 0px;
    border: 2px solid black !important;
    background: var(--swatch);
    position: relative;
    display: block;
    cursor: pointer;
    user-select: none;
}
.swatch__button input~label{
box-shadow: 0 0px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) !important;}

.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] .swatch__button--square input[type="radio"]:checked + label {
    outline: 3px solid #3D6E2E !important;
    outline-offset: 3px;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.20);
}


.rc-bullets{
display:flex !important;
gap:50px !important;
justify-content: center;
}
.rc-h2{
font-size: 40px !important;
}
.rc-sub{
margin:auto !important;
}

.rc-hero-mini {
margin-bottom: 50px !important;
}

.rc-sec{
padding-bottom: 30px !important;}
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
.rc-pdp-wrap {
    margin: 0 !important;
    padding: 0px !important;
    
}
}



.jdgm-btn {
  width: 100%;
}
.radio__fieldset .radio__button input:checked~label {
    border-color: #3D6E2E;
}
.jdgm-histogram__bar {
  width: 30vw !important;
}
.jdgm-write-rev-link, .jdgm-widget-actions-wrapper {
display:none !important;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
    .jdgm-widget:not(.jdgm-review-widget--small,.jdgm-review-widget--medium) :not(.jdgm-histogram-wrapper)>.jdgm-histogram {
        width: 70% !important;
    }

	.related__wrapper .tab-content, .recent__container__inner {
	padding-left: calc(calc(50vh * 0.8) + 0px);
}
.wrapper--full-padded {
padding-left: calc(calc(50vh * 0.8) + 30px);}
#judgeme_product_reviews {
padding-left: calc(calc(50vh * 0.8) + 30px);
}
#judgeme_product_reviews {
width: 80vw !important;
max-width: 80vw !important;}

.toolbar .wrapper--full-padded{
padding-left: 30px;}
}
	}
.jdgm-prev-badge, .jdgm-prev-badge > * {
display: block !important;
}



.jdgm-widget{
margin:0 !important;
}
@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
    #judgeme_product_reviews {
        padding-left: calc(calc(50vh * 0.8) + 50px);
    }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 763px) {
.jdgm-widget{
margin:10px !important;}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
    #judgeme_product_reviews {
        width: calc(100% - 50px) !important;
        max-width: 100vw !important;
    }
}
.jdgm-rev-widg__summary{
align-items:left !important;}
.jdgm-rev-widg__title{
font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 18px !important;
    margin: 0 0 8px;
    letter-spacing: .02em;
    text-align: left;
}
.jdgm-btn--solid, .jdgm-paginate__load-more {
border: 2px black solid !important;
background: #3D6E2E !important; 
color: #fbfbfb !important;
border-radius: 3px !important;
}



.jdgm-btn {
text-transform:uppercase;
font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weight: 1000 !important;
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: .1rem;
}
@media only screen and (max-width: 763px) {
.jdgm-prev-badge {
display:flex !important;
justify-content: center;
gap:5px;
}
.jdgm-prev-badge__text {
    margin-top: .3rem;
font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
}
.jdgm-prev-badge > * {
display:block !important;
}
jdgm-prev-badge__stars{
justify-content:right;
}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 763px) {
.jdgm-prev-badge {
display: flex !important;
justify-content: left;
gap:5px;
}
.jdgm-prev-badge__text {
    margin-top: .3rem;
}
.jdgm-prev-badge > * {
display:block !important;
}
jdgm-prev-badge__stars{
justify-content:right;
}
}



.radio__legend{
margin: 0 !important;}

.product__selectors .radio__fieldset{
padding-bottom:8px;}

.radio__legend{
padding-bottom:10px;}

.swatch__button input:checked~label:after{
opacity:0 !important;
background-color: #3D6E2E;}
.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-wrap: nowrap !important;
  justify-content: flex-start !important;
  align-items: center !important;

  gap: 0px;
  padding: 0;

  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;

  overflow-x: auto !important;
  overflow-y: hidden !important;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;

  
  touch-action: pan-x;

  scrollbar-width: none; 
}
.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons]::-webkit-scrollbar {
  display: none; 
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] radio-swatch {
  flex: 0 0 auto !important;
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] .swatch__button--square {
  
  width: calc((100% - (5 * 10px)) / 6) !important;

  
  aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;

  
  min-width: 44px;
  max-width: 56px;

  border-radius: 0px;
  border: 2px solid black !important;
  background: var(--swatch);

  position: relative;
  display: block;

  cursor: pointer;
  user-select: none;
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] .swatch__button--square label {
  display: block !important;
  width: 100% !important;
  height: 100% !important;
  border-radius: 0px;
  cursor: pointer;
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] .swatch__button--square input[type="radio"] {
  position: absolute;
  opacity: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons]
  .swatch__button--square
  input[type="radio"]:checked + label {
  outline: 3px solid #3D6E2E !important;
  outline-offset: 3px;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,123,255,0.20);
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] .swatch__button--square input.sold-out + label {
  opacity: 0.35;
  cursor: not-allowed;
}


.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons]
  .swatch__button--square
  input.sold-out + label::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 8px;
  border-top: 2px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.55);
  transform: rotate(-35deg);
  pointer-events: none;
}

.radio__fieldset--swatches .radio__buttons{
padding-left: 10px;
margin:0;}
.product__wrapper{
margin: 0;}

.product__images{margin: 0 var(--outer);}

.selector-wrapper--size .radio__fieldset{
padding-left: 16px;
}
.radio__legend{
width: calc(100vw - 32px) !important;
padding-bottom:0
px;}



:root{
    --rc-maxw: 560px;
    --rc-radius: 22px;
    --rc-border: rgba(0,0,0,.10);
    --rc-text: #111;
    --rc-blue: #0b63ff;
    --rc-red: #e11d48;
    --rc-bg: #fbfbfb;

    
    --rc-desktopw: 20vw;
    --rc-desktop-minw: 100px;
  }

  
  #rcCartDevRoot{
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: 2147483000;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.55);

    
    display: none;
    opacity: 0;
    pointer-events: none;

    transition: opacity .18s ease;
  }
  #rcCartDevRoot.isOpen{
    display: block;
    opacity: 1;
    pointer-events: auto;
  }

  #rcCartDevSheetWrap{
    position: absolute;
    left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  #rcCartDevSheet{
    width: 100%;
    max-width: var(--rc-maxw);
    height: min(86vh, 760px);
    background: #fff;
    border-top-left-radius: var(--rc-radius);
    border-top-right-radius: var(--rc-radius);
    box-shadow: 0 -20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    color: var(--rc-text);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial);
    position: relative;
  }

  .rc-handle{
    height: 18px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    background: var(--rc-bg);
  }
  .rc-handle:before{
    content:"";
    width:44px;height:5px;border-radius:999px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.18);
  }

  .rc-ucfont{
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
    letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-LETTER-SPACING, .08em);
  }

  .rc-header{
    padding: 12px 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    position: relative;
    background: var(--rc-bg);
  }
  .rc-title{ font-size: 14px; font-weight: 900; }

  .rc-trackBtn{
    position:absolute;
    right:12px;
    top:10px;
    width:40px;height:40px;
    border: 0 !important;
    outline: none !important;
    background: transparent !important;
    border-radius: 0 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    padding: 0;
    cursor: pointer;
    display:none;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .rc-trackBtn svg{
    width: 22px;height: 22px;
    stroke: rgba(0,0,0,.75);
    stroke-width: 2;
    fill: none;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
  }

  .rc-ship{
    padding: 12px 16px 14px;
    background: var(--rc-bg);
  }
  .rc-shipText{
    font-size: 12px;
    text-align:center;
    text-transform: uppercase !important;
    font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
    font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  }
  .rc-shipBar{
    height: 8px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.12);
    border-radius: 999px;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin: 0 auto;
    margin-top: 10px;
    width:80vw;
  }
  .rc-shipBarFill{
    height: 100%;
    width: 0%;
    background: var(--rc-blue);
    border-radius: 999px;
    transition: width .25s ease;
  }

  .rc-body{
    flex: 1;
    overflow:auto;
    padding: 0 16px 130px;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
    background: var(--rc-bg);
  }

  .rc-item{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns: 100px 1fr;
    gap:12px;
    padding: 8px 0;
  }
  .rc-thumb{
    width:100px;
    height:100px;
    border-radius:10px;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:rgba(0,0,0,.04);
    align-self:start;
  }
  .rc-thumb img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;}

  .rc-meta{min-width:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0;margin:auto;}
  .rc-topline{
    display:flex;
    align-items:flex-start;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .rc-name{
    font-size:16px;
    font-weight:1000;
    line-height:1.05;
    min-width:0;
    flex: 1;
    max-width:50vw;
  }

  .rc-variant{
    font-size:13px;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.55);
    line-height: 1.1;
    white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
    font-weight: 500;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }

  .rc-row2{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:12px;
  }

  .rc-priceWrap{
    display:flex;
    align-items:baseline;
    gap:8px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    min-width: 110px;
  }

  .rc-priceNew{
    font-size:16px;
    font-weight:1000;
    color:#111;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }
  .rc-priceNew.isDeal{ color: var(--rc-red); }

  .rc-priceOld{
    font-size:14px;
    font-weight:800;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    text-decoration: line-through;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }

  .rc-freeTag{
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:1000;
    color: var(--rc-red);
  }

  .rc-qtyWrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
  .rc-qtyLabel{ font-size:12px;color: rgba(0,0,0,.60);font-weight: 900; }
  .rc-qtySelect{
    height:24px;width:72px;border-radius:10px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    background:#fff;padding: 0 10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#111;outline:none;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;margin:0;
  }

  .rc-trashBtn{
    width:25px;height:25px;border-radius:10px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    cursor:pointer;flex: 0 0 auto;border: none !important;outline: none !important;box-shadow: none !important;
    background: transparent !important;padding: 0;-webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .rc-trashBtn svg{
    width:20px;height:20px;fill:none;stroke: rgba(0,0,0,.70);stroke-width:2;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;
  }
  .rc-trashBtn:hover{ background: rgba(0,0,0,.04); }
  .rc-trashBtn:active{ background: rgba(0,0,0,.07); transform: translateY(1px); }

  .rc-footer{
    position:absolute;left:0;right:0;bottom:0;
    background:#fff;border-top: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    padding: 12px 16px 14px;
  }
  .rc-subrow{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom: 10px;}
  .rc-subrow span{font-size:12px;font-weight:1000;color: rgba(0,0,0,.60);}
  .rc-subrow strong{
    font-size:16px;font-weight:1000;color:#111;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }

  
  .rc-discount{
    margin: 10px 0 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #fff;
  }
  .rc-discountHead{
    width: 100%;
    height: 46px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding: 0 14px;
    background: #fff;
    cursor:pointer;
    border: 0;
    outline: none;
  }
  .rc-discountHead span{
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 1000;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.70);
  }
  .rc-chevron{
    width: 18px;height: 18px;
    stroke: rgba(0,0,0,.55);
    stroke-width: 2;
    fill: none;
    stroke-linecap: round;
    stroke-linejoin: round;
    transition: transform .18s ease;
  }
  .rc-discount.isOpen .rc-chevron{ transform: rotate(180deg); }

  .rc-discountBody{
    display:none;
    padding: 12px 14px 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    background: #fff;
  }
  .rc-discount.isOpen .rc-discountBody{ display:block; }

  .rc-discountInput{
    width:100%;
    height:44px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    background: #fff;
    padding: 0 12px;
    outline: none;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 900;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: .06em;
    font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK, system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .rc-discountApply{
    width:100%;
    height:48px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 0;
    background: var(--rc-blue);
    color:#fff;
    cursor:pointer;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 1000;
  }
  .rc-discountApply:disabled{ opacity:.6; cursor:not-allowed; }
  .rc-discountHint{
    margin-top: 10px;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.55);
    text-align:center;
  }

  .rc-checkout{
    width:100%;
    height:56px;
    border-radius:14px;
    background: var(--rc-blue);
    color:#fff;
    text-decoration:none;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    font-size:14px;
    font-weight:1000;
  }

  .rc-small{ font-size:12px;color: rgba(0,0,0,.55);margin-top: 10px;text-align:center; }
  .rc-empty{padding:26px 0;text-align:center;color: rgba(0,0,0,.60);font-size:14px;}
  .rc-loading{opacity:.65; pointer-events:none;}

  @supports(padding: max(0px)) {
    .rc-footer{ padding-bottom: max(14px, env(safe-area-inset-bottom)); }
  }

  
  .rc-upsellWrap{
    margin-top: 14px;
    padding-top: 14px;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
  }
  .rc-upsellTitle{
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 1000;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.70);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap: 10px;
  }
  .rc-upsellHint{
    font-size: 11px;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    font-weight: 900;
  }
  .rc-upsellRow{
    display:flex;
    gap: 8px;
    overflow-x: auto;
    padding: 2px 2px 10px;
    scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  }
  .rc-upsellRow::-webkit-scrollbar{ height: 6px; }
  .rc-upsellRow::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{ background: rgba(0,0,0,.12); border-radius: 999px; }
  .rc-upsellCard{
    flex: 0 0 auto;
    width: 210px;
    background: #fff;
    border: 1px solid var(--rc-border);
    border-radius: 14px;
    padding: 10px;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap: 10px;
    scroll-snap-align: start;
  }
  .rc-upsellImg{
    width: 100%;
    aspect-ratio: 1 / 1;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.04);
  }
  .rc-upsellImg img{ width:100%; height:100%; object-fit: cover; display:block; }
  .rc-upsellMeta{ min-width:0; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap: 4px; }
  .rc-upsellName{
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 1000;
    line-height: 1.05;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
  }
  .rc-upsellVar{
    font-size: 12px;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.55);
    font-weight: 700;
    white-space: nowrap;
    overflow: hidden;
    text-overflow: ellipsis;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }
  .rc-upsellPriceRow{
    display:flex;
    align-items:baseline;
    gap: 8px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
  .rc-upsellPrice{
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 1000;
    color: #111;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }
  .rc-upsellOld{
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    text-decoration: line-through;
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }
  .rc-upsellSale{
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 1000;
    color: var(--rc-red);
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
  }
  .rc-upsellBtn{
    height: 38px;
    padding: 0 14px;
    border-radius: 14px;
    border: 0;
    background: #000;
    color:#fff;
    cursor:pointer;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 1000;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    gap: 8px;
    text-decoration: none;
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
  }
  .rc-upsellPlus{ font-size: 16px; line-height: 1; transform: translateY(-.5px); }

  .rc-totalRight{
    display:flex;
    align-items:baseline;
    gap:10px;
  }

  .rc-retail{
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 900;
    color: rgba(0,0,0,.45);
    font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Arial;
    text-decoration-thickness: 2px;
    text-decoration-color: rgba(0,0,0,.35);
  }

  
  
@media (min-width: 750px){
  
  #rcCartDevSheetWrap{
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;                 
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    align-items: stretch;     
    padding: 0;               
    box-sizing: border-box;
  }

  
  #rcCartDevSheet{
    width: var(--rc-desktopw);     
    min-width: 700px; 
    max-width: var(--rc-maxw);     
    height: 100vh;                
    max-height: 100vh;

    
    border-radius: 0;             ;
    box-shadow: -20px 0 60px rgba(0,0,0,.28);
  }

  
  .rc-shipBar{ width: 100%; }
  .rc-name{ max-width: 100%; }

.rc-handle{ display:none;}

.rc-meta {
min-width: 100%;}

.rc-backorder-line{
width:60%;}
}
</style>
